description: Krushi Ratn FAQ - general questions about the app, features, policies

questions.question: What is Krushi Ratn?
questions.answer: Krushi Ratn is a free digital agricultural marketplace app designed for farmers in Gujarat. It provides: (1) Mandi Bhav — real-time crop market prices from yards across Gujarat; (2) K-Shop — buy agricultural equipment, seeds, fertilizers from verified companies; (3) Buy/Sell Marketplace — trade animals, equipment, and produce directly with other farmers; (4) Farming Videos — educational content from agricultural experts; (5) Agricultural News — latest news, government schemes, and weather alerts; (6) AI Chatbot — ask any farming or app-related question in Gujarati or English.

questions.question: How do I register or create an account?
questions.answer: To register: Open the app → tap 'Register' → enter your mobile number → receive an OTP on SMS → enter the OTP → fill in your name, village, district, and state → tap 'Create Account'. Registration is free and takes less than 2 minutes. No email address is needed — only your mobile number.

questions.question: How do I log in to the app?
questions.answer: Login uses OTP (no password needed). Open app → tap 'Login' → enter your registered mobile number → tap 'Send OTP' → enter the 6-digit OTP received by SMS → tap 'Verify'. You are now logged in. If you did not receive OTP, tap 'Resend OTP' after 60 seconds.

questions.question: How do I buy a product from K-Shop?
questions.answer: To buy from K-Shop: 1. Go to K-Shop tab. 2. Browse or search for the product. 3. Tap the product to see details and price. 4. Tap 'Add to Cart'. 5. Go to Cart (top right icon). 6. Review your order and tap 'Proceed to Checkout'. 7. Enter your delivery address. 8. Select payment method (UPI, net banking, cash on delivery). 9. Tap 'Place Order'. You will receive an order confirmation and can track delivery in Profile → My Orders.

questions.question: How do I sell my product or animal on the marketplace?
questions.answer: To sell on Buy/Sell marketplace: 1. Open Buy/Sell section. 2. Tap the '+' or 'Post Ad' button. 3. Select category (Animal, Equipment, Crop, Land). 4. Fill in product name, description, quantity, and price. 5. Add clear photos (up to 5). 6. Add your contact number. 7. Tap 'Post'. Your listing goes live immediately and buyers can contact you directly. Listing is free.

questions.question: How do I check crop market prices (mandi bhav)?
questions.answer: To check mandi bhav: Open the app → tap 'Mandi Bhav'. Select your state → select district/city → select your crop (Kapas, Wheat, Bajra, etc.) → see today's minimum and maximum price with the yard name. You can also filter by specific market yard or see past dates. To get price alerts, tap the bell icon next to a crop.

questions.question: How do I watch farming educational videos?
questions.answer: To watch videos: Tap 'Videos' in the bottom navigation. Browse featured videos or select a category (Crop Care, Pest Control, Modern Farming, Irrigation). Tap any video to start watching. You can like, comment, save, or share videos. To get more videos from a creator you like, tap 'Follow' on their profile.

questions.question: Where can I read agricultural news?
questions.answer: To read news: Tap 'News' from the Home screen. You will see the latest agricultural news, government scheme announcements, weather alerts, and market updates. Filter news by your state or district to see local news. Tap any article to read the full story.

questions.question: How do I check my order status?
questions.answer: To check order status: Go to Profile → tap 'My Orders'. You will see all your K-Shop orders. Tap any order to see full details: order date, items, price, delivery address, and current status (Placed → Confirmed → Processing → Shipped → Delivered). You can also see the expected delivery date.

questions.question: How do I cancel an order or get a refund?
questions.answer: To cancel an order: Go to Profile → My Orders → tap the order → tap 'Cancel Order' (available only before the order is shipped). For a refund after delivery, contact support through Profile → Help & Support and describe the issue with photos. Refund is processed within 5-7 business days to your original payment method.

questions.question: How do I contact support?
questions.answer: To contact support: Go to Profile → tap 'Help & Support'. You can: (1) Chat with support team in the app, (2) Call the helpline (number shown in app), (3) Send an email from the support screen. Support is available Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 6 PM. For urgent issues with orders, use the 'Report Issue' button on your order detail page.

questions.question: How do I update my profile?
questions.answer: To update profile: Go to Profile tab → tap 'Edit Profile' or the pencil icon. You can update: your name, village, district, state, address and profile photo. After making changes, tap 'Save'.

questions.question: Can I use the app in Gujarati?
questions.answer: Yes! Krushi Ratn fully supports Gujarati, Hindi, and English. To change language: Profile → Language Settings → select Gujarati (ગુજરાતી) → tap Apply. The entire app interface, product names, and news will display in Gujarati. The AI chatbot also understands and responds in Gujarati.

questions.question: Is Krushi Ratn free to use?
questions.answer: Yes, Krushi Ratn is completely free to download and use. Registration is free. Browsing products, checking mandi bhav, watching videos, reading news, and posting Buy/Sell listings are all free. You only pay when you buy a product from K-Shop (you pay the product price + delivery). There is no subscription fee.

questions.question: Does the app work without internet?
questions.answer: Krushi Ratn requires an internet connection for most features since prices and products are updated in real-time. However, previously loaded content (recently viewed products, saved articles, downloaded videos) may be accessible offline temporarily. For the best experience and latest data, a stable 2G or better internet connection is recommended.

questions.question: Does the app show government schemes for farmers?
questions.answer: Yes! The News section includes a 'Government Schemes' category with the latest information about PM Kisan Samman Nidhi, crop insurance (PMFBY), soil health card scheme, irrigation subsidies, and state government schemes for Gujarat farmers. Tap News → filter by 'Government Scheme' category to see the latest announcements.

questions.question: How does the AI chatbot work?
questions.answer: The Krushi Ratn AI chatbot can answer questions about: product prices, K-Shop products, crop mandi bhav, app navigation, and general farming questions. You can type or speak in Gujarati or English. Tap the chat/microphone button at the bottom of the Home screen to start. Ask anything like 'balwan power weeder ni kimat kem che' or 'how to check kapas price in bhavnagar'.

questions.question: How does buying work on the Buy/Sell marketplace?
questions.answer: The Buy/Sell marketplace is a direct farmer-to-farmer trading platform. When you find a product, you contact the seller directly by phone or WhatsApp — there is no in-app payment for Buy/Sell. Payment and handover arrangements are made directly between buyer and seller. Always verify the product before paying. Krushi Ratn is not responsible for individual Buy/Sell transactions, but you can report fraudulent listings through the 'Report Listing' option.

questions.question: How does Krushi Ratn AI help farmers?
questions.answer: Krushi Ratn AI helps farmers in multiple ways: (1) Instant Answers — ask any farming or app question in Gujarati or English by voice or text; (2) Crop Price Lookup — get live mandi bhav for any crop from any Gujarat yard without navigating menus; (3) Navigation Help — AI guides you step-by-step to any feature (how to sell crop, how to buy equipment); (4) Product Discovery — ask about any K-Shop product and AI fetches details and prices; (5) News & Videos — ask for latest farming news or videos on a specific topic; (6) Buy/Sell Guidance — AI helps you list items or find buyers/sellers. The AI works in Gujarati voice, Gujarati text, and English — 24/7.

questions.question: How to use Krushi Ratn app and what features are available?
questions.answer: Krushi Ratn app has 6 main features available on the Home screen: (1) Mandi Bhav — check real-time crop prices (kapas, magfali, bajri, tal, ghau and 40+ crops) from all Gujarat yards. Tap Home → See your registered yard prices, or tap 'See price of other marketing yard' for other yards. (2) K-Shop (Krushi Store) — buy agricultural equipment, seeds, fertilizers from verified companies. Browse categories, tap product, tap 'Buy Now'. (3) Buy/Sell Marketplace — sell your old tractor, animals, equipment to other farmers, or browse listings. (4) Videos — watch educational farming videos on mini tractor, power weeder, organic farming. (5) News — read latest agricultural news and government scheme updates. (6) Crop Sell — sell your harvested crops directly to companies at best price. To start: open app → enter mobile number → OTP → register once → all features unlock.

questions.question: What agricultural products are available in K-Store (K-Shop)?
questions.answer: KrushiRatn એપના K-Store વિભાગમાં ખેડૂતો માટે વિવિધ પ્રકારના ખેતી સંબંધિત ઉત્પાદનો એક જ પ્લેટફોર્મ પર ઉપલબ્ધ છે. અહીં તમે નીચે મુજબના પ્રોડક્ટ્સ મેળવી શકો છો:🌾 ઉપલબ્ધ પ્રોડક્ટ કેટેગરીઝ  🚜 ખેતી મશીનરી અને સાધનો : વોટર પંપ,ચાફ કટર,સીડર,પાવર વીડર,મીની ટિલર,મોટર સ્ટાર્ટર,અર્થ ઓગર,બ્રશ કટર,વુડ ચીપર,રીપર કટર,એગ્રીકલ્ચર મશીન ; 🌱 સ્પ્રેયર (Sprayers) : પેટ્રોલ સ્પ્રેયર, બેટરી સ્પ્રેયર, મેન્યુઅલ સ્પ્રેયર

questions.question: How can I sell my old products for sale? How does buy-sell process work on Krushi Ratn?
questions.answer: To sell your old products (tractor, animal, equipment) on Krushi Ratn: (1) Click on 'Buy Sell' tab on Home screen; (2) Click on 'Sell Your'; (3) Click the 'Sell' button; (4) Select the category in which you want to sell your product — ટ્રેક્ટર, ભેંસ, ગાય, ઘોડો, ખેતી ઓજાર, etc.; (5) Fill the form with required details; (6) Click 'Submit' to list your product for sale. Your listing goes live immediately. Krushi Ratn connects farmers and buyers directly — no middleman, so you get the right price for your product.

questions.question: What are today's latest agricultural news?
questions.answer: To read today's latest agricultural news on Krushi Ratn: tap the 'News' section on the Home screen. The app shows the latest farming news, government scheme updates, market news, and weather alerts relevant to Gujarat farmers. You can also ask me: 'Show me latest news' and I will fetch the current news from our database for you. News categories include general agricultural news, government yojana, mandi updates, and farming tips. The news section is updated regularly.

questions.question: What is a yard in Krushi Ratn?
questions.answer: A Yard is an official government-regulated marketplace where farmers bring their harvested crops to sell at a public auction. In Krushi Ratn, the Mandi Bhav section shows real-time crop prices from yards across Gujarat. Each yard reports the minimum price, maximum price, and modal price for each crop on a daily basis. Yards are organized by city and taluka. Examples of yards in Gujarat include Rajkot Yard, Gondal Yard, Unjha Yard, Bhavnagar Yard, and 100+ others. To see prices from a specific yard: open Mandi Bhav → select district → select yard → select crop.

questions.question: What products are sold in a yard?
questions.answer: Yards in Gujarat trade agricultural crops — not manufactured products. The main crops traded at Gujarat yards and available in Krushi Ratn Mandi Bhav are: (1) Cotton (Kapas / કપાસ); (2) Groundnut (Magfali / મગફળી); (3) Wheat (Ghau / ઘઉં); (4) Bajra (Bajri / બાજરી); (5) Sesame (Tal / તલ); (6) Castor (Erandi / એરંડા); (7) Jowar (Jwar / જુવાર); (8) Mung (Moong / મગ); (9) Chana (Gram / ચણા); (10) Soybean (Soya / સોયાબીન); (11) Corn / Maize (Makai / મકાઈ); (12) Onion (Kanda / ડુંગળી); (13) Garlic (Lasan / લસણ); (14) Tomato (Tameta / ટામેટા); (15) Potato (Bataka / બટાકા); (16) Tuvar Dal (Tuveral / તુવેર); and many more seasonal crops. To check which crops have data for a specific yard, open the Mandi Bhav section in the app and select that yard.

questions.question: What units are used for weights in Krushi Ratn?
questions.answer: Krushi Ratn uses three weight units across its listings and product sections: મણ (Mann / Maund) — the traditional Gujarati unit of weight. 1 Mann = 20 kg. Mandi bhav crop prices are commonly shown per Mann in Gujarat yards. This is the most familiar unit for Gujarat farmers. કિલોગ્રામ (Kilogram / kg) — the standard metric unit. Used for K-Shop products such as seeds, fertilizers, and chemicals, and for smaller crop quantities in Buy/Sell listings. ટન (Ton / Tonne) — used for large bulk quantities. 1 Ton = 1000 kg = 50 Mann. Applicable for large-scale crop trading and bulk orders. When you see a price in Mandi Bhav, check the unit shown alongside — it will be one of these three. You can ask me 'kapas bhav per mann' or 'wheat price per kg' and I will fetch the relevant price data from the database.

questions.question: What products are there in Krushi Ratn?
questions.answer: Krushi Ratn has products and data across three separate sections — each with different types of items: (1) K-Shop Products (buy new farm supplies): Power Weeder, Mini Tractor, Reaper Harvester, Water Pumps, Boom Sprayer, Battery Sprayer, Duster, Seeds (cotton, groundnut, bajra, wheat, sesame varieties), Fertilizers, Pesticides, Chaff Cutter, Thresher, Cultivator, Brush Cutter, Chainsaw, and more from verified companies; (2) Mandi Bhav Crops (check market prices): Cotton, Groundnut, Wheat, Bajra, Sesame, Castor, Jowar, Mung, Chana, Soybean, Corn, Onion, Garlic, Tomato, Potato, Tuvar, and 40+ seasonal crops from Gujarat yards; (3) Buy/Sell Marketplace (farmer-to-farmer trading): Tractors, Buffaloes, Cows, Goats, Horses, Old farm equipment, Land, and anything a farmer wants to sell. You can ask me about any specific product by name and I will fetch details and pricing from the database.

questions.question: What crops are available in Krushi Ratn?
questions.answer: Krushi Ratn's Mandi Bhav section tracks prices for 40+ crops from Gujarat yards. The main crops available are: Cotton (Kapas / કપાસ), Groundnut (Magfali / મગફળી), Wheat (Ghau / ઘઉં), Bajra (Bajri / બાજરી), Sesame (Tal / તલ), Castor (Erandi / એરંડા), Jowar (Jwar / જુવાર), Green Gram (Mung / મગ), Chickpea (Chana / ચણા), Soybean (Soya / સોયાબીન), Corn (Makai / મકાઈ), Onion (Kanda / ડુંગળી), Garlic (Lasan / લસણ), Tomato (Tameta / ટામેટા), Potato (Bataka / બટાકા), Pigeon Pea (Tuvar / તુવેર), Black Gram (Adad / અડદ), Rice (Chaval / ચોખા), Sugarcane (Sherdio / શેરડી), Moth Bean (Math / મઠ), Fennel (Variyali / વરિયાળી), Cumin (Jeera / જીરા), Coriander (Dhana / ધાણા), and more. Not all crops have data for every yard — availability depends on what is being actively traded at that yard on a given day. Ask me any crop name and I will check the current price data.

questions.question: What cities are there in Krushi Ratn?
questions.answer: Krushi Ratn covers all major cities, districts, and talukas across Gujarat for mandi bhav and news. Cities with market yard data include: Ahmedabad, Rajkot, Surat, Vadodara, Bhavnagar, Jamnagar, Junagadh, Mehsana, Gandhinagar, Anand, Bharuch, Navsari, Amreli, Morbi, Patan, Kutch (Bhuj), Sabarkantha, Banaskantha, Gondal, Unjha, Visnagar, Surendranagar, Botad, Porbandar, Gir Somnath, and many more talukas and villages across all 33 districts of Gujarat. You can ask me 'what yards are in Surat' or 'Rajkot ma kayi yards che' and I will fetch the list from the database. For news, you can filter by any Gujarat city or district. The app covers 200+ market yards and 1000+ cities and talukas in Gujarat.

tags: krushi ratn ma shu kari shakay
ક્રૂષિ રત્ન માં શું કરી શકાય
questions.question: What can I do on Krushi Ratn?
questions.answer: On Krushi Ratn app, you can do multiple things: (1) Check the latest crop prices (Mandi Bhav) in nearby market yards. (2) Stay updated with agricultural news and local updates. (3) Sell your crops directly to companies or market yards. (4) Buy agricultural products and services. (5) Buy or sell old farming equipment and goods through the marketplace

questions.question: What services does the app provide to farmers?
questions.answer: Krushi Ratn provides the following services: (1) Latest agricultural news and updates. (2) Latest crop selling prices (Mandi Bhav) from nearby market yards. (3) Facility to sell crops directly to companies. (4) Buy or sell old farming products and equipment. (5)Purchase agriculture-related equipment and supplies.

questions.question: What should I do after receiving buyer inquiries?
questions.answer: After receiving buyer inquiries, you can directly contact the buyer using the provided mobile number and location details in the order or listing. The buying and selling process in the Buy/Sell module is manual, so you need to communicate and finalize the deal directly with the buyer.

questions.question: What details should I check before buying a specific product?
questions.answer: Before buying any product on Krushi Ratn, check the following: For K-Shop Products: (1) Product Name and Model Number — ensure it matches exactly what you need. Ask me 'Balwan Power Weeder model number' to verify; (2) Price and Discount — check the original price and the discounted price. Look for the final amount payable; (3) Specifications — check HP, capacity, weight, power source, and dimensions to ensure it fits your farm requirement; (4) Company / Brand — verify the manufacturer. Krushi Ratn lists only verified companies like MITSUYAMA, RAPL, and Balwan; (5) Delivery Terms — check estimated delivery time and whether delivery is available in your area; (6) Warranty — check if the product comes with a company warranty. For Buy/Sell Listings: (1) Seller Contact — verify the seller's phone number is valid; (2) Product Photos — look at all uploaded photos carefully; (3) Age and Condition — for animals, ask for age, vaccination records, and health status. For equipment, ask for year of purchase and service history; (4) Price Comparison — compare with similar listings before finalizing; (5) Meet in Person — always inspect the item physically before making payment. Never pay in advance without seeing the product.

questions.question: What documents are needed for selling livestock?
questions.answer: The required details and documentation for livestock selling are defined by the Krushi Ratn team. Based on the product or listing type, the app will specify what information or supporting details are needed while posting the listing.

questions.question: What should I do if I face issues using the app?
questions.answer: If you face any issue while using the Krushi Ratn app, you can contact support through the app itself. Go to Profile → Help & Support, where you will find contact details such as email and phone numbers to resolve your issue.

questions.question: What languages does the chatbot support?
questions.answer: The Krushi Ratn AI chatbot is currently available only in Gujarati (ગુજરાતી). For example: 'કપાસ નો ભાવ શું છે?' or 'ઘઉં ની માહિતી આપો'. You can type in Gujarati, and the chatbot will understand and respond accordingly. In future updates, the chatbot will support multiple languages including Gujarati, English, and Hindi, allowing users to interact in their preferred language.

questions.question: What features are available on the home screen?
questions.answer: On home screen, users can view Latest news and updates, K-Shop products for agricultural needs, Buy/Sell marketplace for trading old or used items, educational farming videos, upcoming features of the app, and daily crop prices from different market yards.

questions.question: What makes Krushi Ratn different from other apps?
questions.answer: Krushi Ratn is built specifically for Gujarat farmers and stands apart from general apps in these ways: (1) All-in-One for Gujarat Farmers — mandi bhav, K-Shop, buy/sell, videos, news, and crop selling are all in a single app. No need to use 5 different apps; (2) Real-time Mandi Bhav — live crop prices from 200+ APMC yards across all Gujarat districts updated daily. Most apps only show delayed or limited data; (3) Gujarati-First Design — the entire app, AI chatbot, and content is available in Gujarati. The AI understands Gujarati script, Romanized Gujarati, and English — built for farmers who are not comfortable in English; (4) Verified K-Shop Companies — only genuine, verified agricultural companies sell on K-Shop. No counterfeit products; (5) Direct Farmer-to-Farmer Trading — the Buy/Sell marketplace connects farmers directly with no middlemen or commission fees; (6) AI Chatbot in Gujarati — ask any farming or price question by voice or text in Gujarati and get an instant answer. No other agricultural app in Gujarat offers this; (7) Crop Selling to Companies — farmers can directly sell harvested crops to verified companies at transparent prices, eliminating traders and commission agents; (8) Free to Use — registration, mandi bhav, videos, news, and buy/sell listings are all completely free. You only pay when buying a K-Shop product.
